title: LIFELINE CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: LIFELINE CONNECTIONS EAST VANCOUVER LIFELINE CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Specializes in mental health and substance use disorder outpatient services including individual and group counseling, detox, residential, outpatient, and integrated care. 11719 NE 95th Street Suite A/D Vancouver, WA 98682 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Appointments: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Medication Assisted Recovery (MAR) rapid response: Monday-Friday 9am-11am Email (360) 984-5511 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 984-5511 Mental Health Outpatient Main phone (360) 719-4430 Outpatient Program Deaf and Hard of Hearing Alternate (360) 295-1439 MAR Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Oregon Health Plan/Health Share and most major private insurance plans; sliding scale available. DOCUMENTS: Proof of insurance, proof of income, photo ID LANGUAGES: English, American Sign Language (ASL), interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: C-Tran bus routes 7 and 72 with a stop within 1 block Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Deafness Detoxification Detoxification * Deafness Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Deafness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
